zh.lifeSummary: 當Grace Cunliffe於大約1593年出生在英國藍卡爾曼徹斯特時，她的父親William Cunliffe38歲，母親Elizabeth Hall43歲。她於1618年2月2日與Thomas Brooks在英國藍卡爾曼徹斯特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1664年5月12日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可康可德享年72歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可康可德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Grace Cunliffe于大约1593年出生在英国藍卡爾曼徹斯特时，她的父亲William Cunliffe38岁，母亲Elizabeth Hall43岁。她于1618年2月2日与Thomas Brooks在英国藍卡爾曼徹斯特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1664年5月12日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可康可德享年72岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州米德萊可康可德。

nameMeanings.name: Cunliffe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from a place in Lancashire, near Rishton, recorded in 1246 as Kunteclive, from Old English cunte ‘cunt’ + clif ‘slope’, i.e. ‘slope with a slit or crack in it’.

nameMeanings.name: Grace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the abstract noun (via Old French, from Latin gratia), this name occurs occasionally in the 15th century, and by the 1540s was among the most popular girls' names in some parishes. It has always been particularly popular in Scotland and northern England (borne, for example, by Grace Darling , the lighthouse keeper's daughter whose heroism in 1838 , saving sailors in a storm, caught the popular imagination). In more recent times it was famous as the name of the actress Grace Kelly ( 1928–82 ), who became Princess Grace of Monaco. In Ireland it is used as an Anglicized form of Gráinne .

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Grace Cunliffe was born about 1593, in Manchester, Lancashire, England, her father, William Cunliffe, was 38 and her mother, Elizabeth Hall, was 43. She married Thomas Brooks on 2 February 1618, in Manchester, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 12 May 1664, in Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 72, and was buried in Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Grace Cunliffe est née environ 1593, à Manchester, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, William Cunliffe, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Hall, avait 43 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Brooks le 2 février 1618, à Manchester, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 12 mai 1664, à Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterrée à Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Grace Cunliffe um 1593 in Manchester, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Cunliffe 38 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Hall 43. Sie hat am 2. Februar 1618 in Manchester, Lancashire, England Thomas Brooks geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 12. Mai 1664 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Grace Cunliffe è nata il circa 1593 nel Manchester, Lancashire, England, sua padre, William Cunliffe, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Hall, aveva 43 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Brooks il 2 febbraio 1618, nel Manchester, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 12 maggio 1664, nel Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolta a Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Grace Cunliffeが約1593年にイギリスランカシュアイアマンチェスターで生まれた時，父William Cunliffeは38歳，母Elizabeth Hallは43歳であった。1618年2月2日にイギリスランカシュアイアマンチェスターでThomas Brooksと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1664年5月12日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスコンコルドで72歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスコンコルドにて埋葬された。

ko.Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Co: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 콘코르드
ko.Concord, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Briti: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 콘코르드
ko.lifeSummary: Grace Cunliffe(이)가 대략 1593년 영국 랭카실르 먼체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Cunliffe(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Hall(은)는 43세였다. 그녀는 1618년 2월 2일 영국 랭카실르 먼체스터에서 Thomas Brooks(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1664년 5월 12일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 콘코르드에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 콘코르드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Grace Cunliffe nasceu aproximadamente 1593, em Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Cunliffe, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Hall, tinha 43 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Brooks em 2 de fevereiro de 1618, em Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 12 de maio de 1664, em Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 72 anos, e foi sepultada em Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Grace Cunliffe родилась около 1593 г. в местности манчестир, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Cunliffe было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Hall, 43. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Brooks 2 февраля 1618 г. в местности манчестир, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 12 мая 1664 г. в местности конкорд, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 72 лет и была похоронена в местности конкорд, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

Se casó con Thomas Brooks el 2 de febrero de 1618, en Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 12 de mayo de 1664, en Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultada en Concord, Middlesex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
